description: FDS micro-interaction library. Every interactive component must implement at least one pattern from this file. Patterns are token-sourced, luxury-grade, and never decorative.
rule: Every new interactive component MUST apply at least one of these patterns. Choose based on component category. All CSS uses only FDS tokens — zero hardcoded values.

button-press.description: Tactile press feedback — scale down + slight opacity drop on activation. Signals physical press to the user.
button-press.css: .f-button:active { transform: scale(0.97); opacity: 0.92; transition: transform 120ms var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), opacity 120ms var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); } .f-button { transition: background var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), transform 120ms var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), opacity 120ms var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); }
button-press.reducedMotion: Disable transform + opacity transition; keep background color transition only

button-hover-lift.description: Button lifts 1px off the surface on hover, shadow deepens. Signals interactivity before click.
button-hover-lift.css: .f-button:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--f-brand-shadow-medium); } .f-button { transition: background var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), box-shadow var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); }
button-hover-lift.reducedMotion: Remove entirely — no transform, no shadow change on hover

card-hover-lift.description: Card rises 2px off the page, shadow jumps to large. Transforms a static surface into a clear call-to-action.
card-hover-lift.css: .f-card { transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), box-shadow var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: var(--f-brand-shadow-large); }
card-hover-lift.reducedMotion: Remove entirely — no transform, shadow stays at resting state

input-focus-ring.description: Border snaps to focus colour + 2px outline appears. Clear, accessible keyboard navigation signal.
input-focus-ring.css: .f-input { transition: border-color var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), outline-color var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); outline: var(--f-brand-border-size-focused) solid transparent; outline-offset: var(--f-brand-space-xs); } .f-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--f-brand-color-border-focused); outline-color: var(--f-brand-color-border-focused); }
input-focus-ring.reducedMotion: Keep — focus ring is a WCAG accessibility requirement, never remove

accordion-expand.description: Content reveals smoothly downward using grid-template-rows trick. GPU-safe height animation — no layout thrash.
accordion-expand.css: .f-accordion__content { display: grid; grid-template-rows: 0fr; transition: grid-template-rows var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-accordion--expanded .f-accordion__content { grid-template-rows: 1fr; } .f-accordion__content-inner { overflow: hidden; } .f-accordion__icon { transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); } .f-accordion--expanded .f-accordion__icon { transform: rotate(180deg); }

modal-entrance.description: Modal scales in from 95% → 100% with opacity fade. Backdrop fades simultaneously. Feels deliberate, not abrupt.
modal-entrance.platforms: web (Sidesheet slides from right); app (Modal Alert uses same scale pattern)
modal-entrance.css: .f-modal { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0; transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-gentle) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), opacity var(--f-brand-motion-duration-gentle) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); pointer-events: none; } .f-modal--open { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; } .f-modal__backdrop { opacity: 0; transition: opacity var(--f-brand-motion-duration-gentle) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-modal--open .f-modal__backdrop { opacity: 1; }
modal-entrance.reducedMotion: Skip transform/opacity — modal appears instantly; keep pointer-events toggle

drawer-slide.description: App Drawer slides from bottom; Web Sidesheet slides from right. Backdrop fades simultaneously.
drawer-slide.appCSS: .f-drawer { transform: translateY(100%); transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-gentle) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-drawer--open { transform: translateY(0); }
drawer-slide.webCSS: .f-sidesheet { transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-gentle) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-sidesheet--open { transform: translateX(0); } [dir='rtl'] .f-sidesheet { transform: translateX(-100%); } [dir='rtl'] .f-sidesheet--open { transform: translateX(0); }
drawer-slide.reducedMotion: Skip transform — drawer appears at final position instantly

dropdown-reveal.description: Dropdown list fades + translates 4px down from anchor. Closes with reverse. Natural spatial relationship.
dropdown-reveal.css: .f-dropdown__list { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); transition: opacity var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); pointer-events: none; } .f-dropdown--open .f-dropdown__list { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); pointer-events: auto; }

toggle-switch.description: Thumb slides across track with background colour transition. Physical switch metaphor.
toggle-switch.css: .f-toggle__track { transition: background-color var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); } .f-toggle__thumb { transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); transform: translateX(0); } .f-toggle--checked .f-toggle__thumb { transform: translateX(20px); } .f-toggle--checked .f-toggle__track { background-color: var(--f-brand-color-background-primary); }
toggle-switch.reducedMotion: Set transition-duration: 0.01ms — thumb jumps to position

checkbox-check.description: Box fills with brand colour, checkmark strokes in via SVG path animation. Confident confirmation.
checkbox-check.css: .f-checkbox__box { transition: background-color var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), border-color var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); } .f-checkbox__check { stroke-dasharray: 24; stroke-dashoffset: 24; transition: stroke-dashoffset var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); } .f-checkbox--checked .f-checkbox__box { background-color: var(--f-brand-color-background-primary); border-color: var(--f-brand-color-border-primary); } .f-checkbox--checked .f-checkbox__check { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
checkbox-check.reducedMotion: Skip stroke animation — checkmark appears instantly

success-pulse.description: Component scales to 1.05 then returns to 1 after success state is reached. Subtle 'job done' confirmation.
success-pulse.css: @keyframes f-success-pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } } .f-component--success { animation: f-success-pulse var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry) 1; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .f-component--success { animation: none; } }
success-pulse.reducedMotion: Remove entirely — state colour change alone communicates success

error-shake.description: Component shakes horizontally on error state — physical 'wrong' signal. Lateral 4px oscillation × 3.
error-shake.trigger: state transitions to Error (especially failed form submission)
error-shake.css: @keyframes f-error-shake { 0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); } 20% { transform: translateX(-4px); } 40% { transform: translateX(4px); } 60% { transform: translateX(-4px); } 80% { transform: translateX(2px); } } .f-input--error, .f-component--error { animation: f-error-shake 480ms var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default) 1; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .f-input--error, .f-component--error { animation: none; } }
error-shake.reducedMotion: Remove entirely — error border + icon + text communicates the state without motion

skeleton-shimmer.description: Shimmer gradient sweeps left-to-right on placeholder content. Standard skeleton loading pattern.
skeleton-shimmer.trigger: Loading state where content dimensions are known
skeleton-shimmer.css: @keyframes f-skeleton-shimmer { 0% { background-position: -200% 0; } 100% { background-position: 200% 0; } } .f-skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--f-brand-color-background-disabled) 25%, var(--f-brand-color-background-default) 50%, var(--f-brand-color-background-disabled) 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: f-skeleton-shimmer 1500ms linear infinite; border-radius: var(--f-brand-radius-sm); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .f-skeleton { animation: none; background: var(--f-brand-color-background-disabled); } }
skeleton-shimmer.note: Only use skeleton when content dimensions are predictable. For unknown-size content, use Oryx spinner (Loading component).

tooltip-entrance.description: Tooltip fades in + translates 4px from pointer direction. Disappears immediately on blur/mouseout.
tooltip-entrance.css: .f-tooltip { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); transition: opacity var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); pointer-events: none; } .f-tooltip--visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); pointer-events: auto; }

notification-slide.description: Toast/notification slides from top with backdrop fade. Auto-dismisses after content read time.
notification-slide.platforms: both (App: bottom of screen; Web: top-right)
notification-slide.appCSS: .f-notification { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), opacity var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-notification--visible { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
notification-slide.webCSS: .f-notification { transform: translateY(-100%); opacity: 0; transition: transform var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry), opacity var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry); } .f-notification--visible { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
notification-slide.reducedMotion: Skip transform — fade opacity only (or appear instantly)

tab-indicator.description: Active tab underline or pill glides smoothly between items on tab change.
tab-indicator.css: .f-tab-bar__indicator { position: absolute; bottom: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--f-brand-color-border-primary); transition: left var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default), width var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); }
tab-indicator.reducedMotion: Skip transition — indicator jumps to new position

page-transition.description: Route change: current content fades + slides left; new content enters from right. Full-page spatial model.
page-transition.platforms: both (App: slide left/right; Web: fade + translate)
page-transition.css: .f-page-exit { animation: f-page-exit var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-exit) forwards; } .f-page-enter { animation: f-page-enter var(--f-brand-motion-duration-quick) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry) forwards; } @keyframes f-page-exit { to { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-16px); } } @keyframes f-page-enter { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(16px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } }
page-transition.note: Disable pointer events on the exiting page during transition
page-transition.reducedMotion: Skip transform/opacity — use instant content swap

progress-fill.description: Progress bar fill width animates smoothly to new value on state change.
progress-fill.reducedMotion: Skip transition — bar jumps to new width

badge-pop.description: New badge/count appears with a scale-in pop. Draws attention to new notifications without scrolling.
badge-pop.css: @keyframes f-badge-pop { 0% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0; } 80% { transform: scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } } .f-badge--new { animation: f-badge-pop var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-entry) 1; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .f-badge--new { animation: none; } }

link-underline.description: Link underline grows from left to right on hover. Reinforces interactive affordance without colour change.
link-underline.css: .f-link { text-decoration: none; background-image: linear-gradient(var(--f-brand-color-text-primary), var(--f-brand-color-text-primary)); background-size: 0% 1px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: 0 100%; transition: background-size var(--f-brand-motion-duration-instant) var(--f-brand-motion-easing-default); } .f-link:hover { background-size: 100% 1px; }
link-underline.reducedMotion: Remove — show underline by default on link hover without transition

selectionGuide.rule: Match interaction to component category. When in doubt, use the simpler pattern.
loading: skeleton-shimmer (known dimensions) OR use Loading component
